projects.name: Resyntha
projects.description: Multi-Agent Research Intelligence Platform automating literature review, knowledge extraction, and research landscape generation using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Groq.

projects.name: Atlas
projects.description: Production-grade RAG platform with OCR pipeline, pgvector semantic search, streaming responses, and citation-aware AI.

projects.name: Engineering Portfolio
projects.description: Full-stack portfolio with terminal-inspired UI and AI assistant using React, Vite, Express, and LLM APIs.

projects.name: SUMS - Smart University Management System
projects.description: Role-based academic and placement management system built with Express.js, PostgreSQL, and Node.js. Features BCNF-normalized schemas and RBAC.

projects.name: School Management API
projects.description: REST APIs with geolocation-based features for school data management. Built with Express.js and MySQL.

philosophy.approach: Prefers building real production-quality systems over chasing buzzwords. Learning comes from hands-on debugging, iteration, and consistent practice.
